prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document outlines regulations for higher-risk building work and the associated processes, which are governed by legislation applicable in England. The Building Safety Regulator operates under regulations established by English law, indicating that these guidelines pertain specifically to England.
